title: Design tokens
description: Color, sizing, and typography token bindings by component state

sections.colorTokens: State-by-state color breakdown. Columns: one per visual element that has a color (Border, Label, Background, Icon, etc). Rows: one per interactive state. Include Default, Focused, Error, Disabled at minimum. More states if the component has them (Hovered, Active, Selected).
sections.sizingTokens: Every fixed dimension with its token name and resolved pixel value. Cover: height, horizontal padding, vertical padding, internal gaps, border-radius, border-width, icon size.
sections.typography: Font specification per text element. Include: element name, token name, resolved font string (family weight size/lineHeight), tracking value (even if 0).

qualityRules: Every token must use --zen-* prefix in the token name field, never hardcoded hex
hex field is REQUIRED alongside every color token (used for Color Swatch .fills and HTML swatch dot)
colorTokens must cover Default, Focused, Error, Disabled states at minimum
First row's column headers define the table header — be consistent across states
sizingTokens must cover height, horizontal padding, vertical gaps, and border-radius
typography must include tracking value even when 0 — renderers expect this field
Do not combine multiple tokens into one row — one row per property
